summary: Restricted 5xx retry to idempotent HTTP methods (GET, PUT, DELETE, HEAD, OPTIONS).
reason: Original code retried every 5xx regardless of method. createRetagTag POSTs /tags and a 5xx after server-side commit would, on retry, create a duplicate tag. Now POST and PATCH return the 5xx without retry; caller can surface a clean error and the user re-decides. Closes Greptile fourth re-review P1 on PR #624.
